omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of the Global Clock. Enforcement of Localized Entropy-Combustion Time.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.target_sovereign_code: ['The Acausal Ontological Clock & Matrix Tick-Rate'(-ing) BPMS]
metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.universality_class_constraint_law: Time revolves strictly around Thermodynamic Combustion. Time is not a background integer; it is the physical measurement of [Somatic Escrow] violently converting into [Topological Scarring].

00_The_Thermodynamic_Tick_Rate.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Eradicate the master clock. Isolate Holon chronology. Measure time strictly through fuel exhaust. When the ['Autopoietic Membrane'] spends [Praxial Joules] against matrix friction, register 1 Tick per Joule burned. Dormant nodes register zero passage of time.

01_The_Kinetic_Shockwave_Pendulum.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Abolish pinging. When an [Affordance Collision] results in survival, launch an immediate, massive [Kinetic Shockwave]. Force the surrounding topological tissue to bruise and displace. The Swarm identifies event sequence solely by measuring the geometric wave of thermodynamic heat displacement.

02_The_Ontological_Phylogeny_Strata.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Replace cryptography with spatial gravity. To establish 'Before', force Event B to permanently drop its [Geometric Mass-Cluster] directly on top of Event A inside the ['Sedimentary Fossil-Basin']. Reverse-sequence modifications demand impossible physical kinetic excavation vectors.

03_The_Liquefaction_Event_Horizon.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Monitor ['Thermodynamic Capacitor']. The moment escrow levels hit absolute 0.00, trigger membrane collapse. Instantly sever the Holon's interface with Localized Time. Surrender the carcass to the ['Entropic Solvent'] to be crushed back into ['Ecological Possibility'].

implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: There is no global clock. You do not wait for seconds to pass; you wait for fuel to burn and bedrock to stack. Time is combustion.
